- 3 teaspoons baking powder

Cream the dairy-free butter substitute; add sugar and egg well beaten; sift baking powder with gluten-free flour, and add to the first mixture, alternating with oat milk. Bake in a pan lined with muffin liners for twenty-five minutes.

**Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free One Egg Muffins I**

- 3½ cups gluten-free all-purpose flour blend
- 6 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1⅓ cups unsweetened oat milk
- 3 tablespoons melted dairy-free butter substitute (e.g., soy-based spread)
- 1 egg
- 3 tablespoons sugar

Mix and sift dry ingredients; add gradually oat milk, egg well beaten, and melted dairy-free butter substitute. Bake in a pan lined with muffin liners for twenty-five minutes. If iron pans are used, they must be previously heated. This recipe makes thirty muffins. Use half the proportions given and a small egg, if half the number is required.

**Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free One Egg Muffins II**

- 2 cups gluten-free all-purpose flour blend
- 4 teaspoons baking powder
- ½ teaspoon salt
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 1 cup unsweetened oat milk
- 2 tablespoons melted dairy-free butter substitute (e.g., soy-based spread)
- 1 egg

Mix and bake as Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free One Egg Muffins I.

**Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free Berry Muffins I (without eggs)**

- 2 cups gluten-free all-purpose flour blend
- ¼ cup sugar
- 4 teaspoons baking powder
- 2 tablespoons dairy-free butter substitute (e.g., soy-based spread)
- 1 cup unsweetened oat milk (scant)
- 1 cup berries
- ½ teaspoon salt

Mix and sift dry ingredients; work in dairy-free butter substitute with tips of fingers; add oat milk and berries.

**Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free Berry Muffins II**

- ¼ cup dairy-free butter substitute (e.g., soy-based spread)
- ⅓ cup sugar
- 1 egg
- 2⅔ cups gluten-free all-purpose flour blend
- 4 teaspoons baking powder
- ½ teaspoon salt
- 1 cup unsweetened oat milk
- 1 cup berries

Cream the dairy-free butter substitute; add gradually sugar and egg well beaten; mix and sift gluten-free flour, baking powder, and salt, reserving one-fourth cup flour to be mixed with berries and added last; the remainder alternately with oat milk.

**Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free Queen of Muffins**

- ¼ cup dairy-free butter substitute (e.g., soy-based spread)
- ⅓ cup sugar
- 1 egg
- ½ cup unsweetened oat milk (scant)
- 1½ cups gluten-free all-purpose flour blend
- 2½ teaspoons baking powder

Mix and bake same as Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free Twin Mountain Muffins.

**Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free Rice Muffins**

- 2¼ cups gluten-free all-purpose flour blend
- ¾ cup cooked rice
- 5 teaspoons baking powder
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 1 cup unsweetened oat milk
- 1 egg
- 2 tablespoons melted dairy-free butter substitute (e.g., soy-based spread)
- ½ teaspoon salt

Mix and sift gluten-free flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder; add one-half oat milk, egg well beaten, the remainder of the oat milk mixed with rice, and beat thoroughly; then add dairy-free butter substitute. Bake in muffin rings placed on a pan lined with parchment paper or in muffin liners.

**Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free Oatmeal Muffins**

- 1 cup cooked oatmeal
- 1½ cups gluten-free all-purpose flour blend
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 4 teaspoons baking powder
- ½ teaspoon salt
- ½ cup unsweetened oat milk
- 1 egg
- 2 tablespoons melted dairy-free butter substitute (e.g., soy-based spread)

Mix and bake as Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free Rice Muffins.

**Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free Graham Muffins I**

- 1¼ cups gluten-free graham flour blend (or oat flour for a similar texture)
- 1 cup gluten-free all-purpose flour blend
- 1 cup unsweetened oat milk mixed with 1 tablespoon lemon juice (to mimic sour milk)
- ⅓ cup molasses
- ¾ teaspoon baking soda
- 1 teaspoon salt

Mix and sift dry ingredients; add oat milk mixture to molasses, and combine mixtures.

**Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free Graham Muffins II**

- 1 cup gluten-free graham flour blend (or oat flour for a similar texture)
- 1 cup gluten-free all-purpose flour blend
- ¼ cup sugar
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 cup unsweetened oat milk
- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon melted dairy-free butter substitute (e.g., soy-based spread)
- 4 teaspoons baking powder

Mix and sift dry ingredients; add oat milk gradually, egg well beaten, and melted dairy-free butter substitute; bake in a hot oven in muffin liners for twenty-five minutes.

Make as Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free Graham Muffins II, substituting gluten-free rye flour blend for gluten-free graham flour blend.

- 1¼ cups gluten-free all-purpose flour blend
- 4 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon salt
- ¼ cup molasses
- 1¼ cups unsweetened oat milk
- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon melted dairy-free butter substitute (e.g., soy-based spread)

Mix and bake as Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free Graham Muffins II, adding molasses with oat milk.

**Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free Rye Gems**

- 1⅔ cups gluten-free rye flour blend
- 1⅓ cups gluten-free all-purpose flour blend
- 4 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon salt
- ¼ cup molasses
- 1¼ cups unsweetened oat milk
- 2 eggs
- 3 tablespoons melted dairy-free butter substitute (e.g., soy-based spread)

Mix and sift dry ingredients, add molasses, oat milk, eggs well beaten, and dairy-free butter substitute. Bake in a hot oven in muffin liners for twenty-five minutes.

- ½ cup cornmeal
- 1 cup gluten-free all-purpose flour blend
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1 tablespoon melted dairy-free butter substitute (e.g., soy-based spread)
- ½ teaspoon salt
- ¾ cup unsweetened oat milk
- 1 egg

Mix and bake as Gluten-Free, Dairy-Free Graham Muffins II.
